stemHtml: How will a fire warning be indicated?

options.a: Continuous bell, yellow master caution light, red light on engine fire extinguisher button.
options.b: Continuous bell, red master warning light, red light on engine fire extinguisher button.
options.c: Intermittent bell, red master warning light, red light on engine fire extinguisher button.
options.d: Beeper, red master warning light, amber light on engine fire extinguisher button.
